# Collaborative Project & Task Management API — Requirements

---

## 1\. Project Overview

**What**: A backend-only REST API for collaborative project and task management. Users create projects, invite members with roles, create/assign tasks, leave comments, and receive real-time notifications via WebSocket.

**Key capabilities** (all mandatory):

| \# | Capability | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1 | Multi-user accounts | Register, login, profile management, get current user profile |
| 2 | Project management | CRUD \+ membership management |
| 3 | Task tracking | Create, assign, status transitions, filtering, sorting |
| 4 | Commenting | Threaded comments on tasks |
| 5 | Role-based permissions (RBAC) | Admin / Project Manager / Member |
| 6 | JWT auth \+ refresh tokens | OAuth2 Password flow, bcrypt |
| 7 | Async everywhere | Async endpoints, async SQLAlchemy sessions |
| 8 | Background tasks | Simulated email on task assignment & project creation |
| 9 | WebSocket notifications | `/ws/notifications` — task status changes |
| 10 | Structured logging | JSON logs, request IDs, execution timing |
| 11 | Testing ≥ 80% coverage | pytest, separate test DB |
| 12 | Deployment readiness | `.env.example`, health check, Docker (optional) |

**Tech stack** (mandatory):

| Layer | Choice |
| :---- | :---- |
| Framework | FastAPI \+ Uvicorn |
| Validation | Pydantic v2 |
| ORM | SQLAlchemy 2.0 (async) |
| Database | PostgreSQL 17 |
| Migrations | Alembic |
| Auth | PyJWT \+ passlib\[bcrypt\] |
| Testing | pytest \+ pytest-asyncio \+ httpx |
| Linting | Ruff |
| Type checking | ty |
| Config | pydantic-settings \+ python-dotenv |
| Logging | structlog |

---

## 2\. Project Structure

| fast\_api\_practice/├── alembic/                          \# Alembic migrations│   ├── env.py│   ├── script.py.mako│   └── versions/├── src/│   ├── main.py                       \# App factory \+ lifespan│   ├── core/                         \# Cross-cutting concerns│   │   ├── config.py                 \# Settings (pydantic-settings \+ .env)│   │   ├── security.py               \# Password hashing, JWT create/decode│   │   └── permissions.py            \# RBAC permission checker│   ├── domain/                       \# Pure business logic \-- NO framework imports│   │   ├── entities/                 \# Plain Python dataclasses (framework-agnostic)│   │   │   ├── user.py              \# UserEntity dataclass│   │   │   ├── project.py           \# ProjectEntity dataclass│   │   │   ├── project\_member.py    \# ProjectMemberEntity dataclass│   │   │   ├── task.py              \# TaskEntity dataclass \+ business methods│   │   │   └── comment.py           \# CommentEntity dataclass│   │   ├── repositories/            \# Abstract repository interfaces (ABCs)│   │   │   ├── base.py              \# Generic CRUD ABC│   │   │   ├── user\_repository.py   \# UserRepository ABC│   │   │   ├── project\_repository.py│   │   │   ├── task\_repository.py│   │   │   └── comment\_repository.py│   │   └── services/                \# Business logic layer (depends on ABCs only)│   │       ├── auth\_service.py│   │       ├── user\_service.py│   │       ├── project\_service.py│   │       ├── task\_service.py│   │       └── comment\_service.py│   ├── infrastructure/               \# Framework-specific implementations│   │   ├── database/│   │   │   ├── connection.py         \# Async engine, session factory│   │   │   ├── models.py            \# SQLAlchemy ORM models (all tables)│   │   │   └── repositories.py      \# Concrete repo implementations \+ \_to\_entity()│   │   ├── logging/│   │   │   ├── setup.py              \# structlog config│   │   │   └── middleware.py         \# Request ID \+ timing middleware│   │   └── background.py            \# Email notification simulators│   ├── schemas/                      \# Pydantic request/response schemas│   │   ├── user.py│   │   ├── project.py│   │   ├── task.py│   │   ├── comment.py│   │   └── common.py                 \# Pagination, error response schemas│   ├── api/                          \# Route layer│   │   ├── dependencies.py           \# DI: get\_db, get\_current\_user, permission deps│   │   └── v1/│   │       ├── auth.py               \# POST /register, /login, /refresh│   │       ├── users.py              \# GET/PATCH /users/me│   │       ├── projects.py           \# CRUD \+ membership endpoints│   │       ├── tasks.py              \# CRUD \+ assign \+ status transitions│   │       └── comments.py           \# Create \+ list comments│   └── websockets/│       └── notifications.py          \# WebSocket connection manager├── tests/│   ├── conftest.py                   \# Fixtures: async client, test DB, auth helpers│   ├── test\_auth.py│   ├── test\_users.py│   ├── test\_projects.py│   ├── test\_tasks.py│   ├── test\_comments.py│   └── test\_permissions.py├── docs/│   └── erd.png                       \# ER diagram├── alembic.ini├── pyproject.toml├── .env.example├── .gitignore└── README.md |
| :---- |

---

## 3\. Database Design & ERD

### Entity Relationship Diagram

![][image1]

### Relationships

| Relationship | Type | Notes |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| User → Projects (owner) | 1-N | `projects.owner_id → users.id` |
| User ↔ Projects (member) | N-N | Via `project_members` join table with `role` column |
| Project → Tasks | 1-N | `tasks.project_id → projects.id`  |
| User → Tasks (assignee) | 1-N | `tasks.assignee_id → users.id` (nullable) |
| User → Tasks (creator) | 1-N | `tasks.creator_id → users.id` |
| User → Comments | 1-N | `comments.author_id → users.id` |
| Task → Comments | 1-N | `comments.task_id → tasks.id` |

### Enums

| class UserRole(StrEnum):    ADMIN \= "admin"    MANAGER \= "manager"        \# "Project Manager" in requirements    MEMBER \= "member"class ProjectMemberRole(StrEnum):    MANAGER \= "manager"    MEMBER \= "member"class TaskStatus(StrEnum):    TODO \= "todo"    IN\_PROGRESS \= "in\_progress"    DONE \= "done"class TaskPriority(StrEnum):    LOW \= "low"    MEDIUM \= "medium"    HIGH \= "high" |
| :---- |

### RBAC rules

| Action | Admin | Project Manager | Member |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Create project | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Delete project | ✅ | ❌ | ❌ |
| Add/remove project members | ✅ (any) | ✅ (own projects) | ❌ |
| View project tasks | ✅ | ✅ (member) | ✅ (member) |
| Create task in project | ✅ | ✅ (member) | ✅ (member) |
| Update task | ✅ | ✅ (member) | ✅ (owner/assignee only) |
| Delete task | ✅ | ✅ (member) | ✅ (creator only) |
| Create comment | ✅ | ✅ (member) | ✅ (member) |

---

## 4\. API Design

Base URL: `/api/v1`

### Auth endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `POST` | `/auth/register` | ❌ | Register new user |
| `POST` | `/auth/login` | ❌ | Login → access \+ refresh token |
| `POST` | `/auth/refresh` | ✅ refresh | Rotate tokens |

### User endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `GET` | `/users/me` | ✅ | Get current user profile |
| `PATCH` | `/users/me` | ✅ | Update profile (full\_name, email, password) |

### Project endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Permission |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `POST` | `/projects` | ✅ | Any authenticated user |
| `GET` | `/projects` | ✅ | List user's projects (member of) |
| `GET` | `/projects/{id}` | ✅ | Project member |
| `PATCH` | `/projects/{id}` | ✅ | Manager/Owner |
| `DELETE` | `/projects/{id}` | ✅ | Admin only |
| `POST` | `/projects/{id}/members` | ✅ | Manager/Owner |
| `DELETE` | `/projects/{id}/members/{user_id}` | ✅ | Manager/Owner |
| `GET` | `/projects/{id}/members` | ✅ | Project member |

### Task endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Permission |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `POST` | `/projects/{project_id}/tasks` | ✅ | Project member |
| `GET` | `/projects/{project_id}/tasks` | ✅ | Project member (with filter/sort/paginate) |
| `GET` | `/tasks/{id}` | ✅ | Project member |
| `PATCH` | `/tasks/{id}` | ✅ | Creator, assignee, or manager |
| `PATCH` | `/tasks/{id}/assign` | ✅ | Manager or creator |
| `PATCH` | `/tasks/{id}/status` | ✅ | Creator, assignee, or manager |
| `DELETE` | `/tasks/{id}` | ✅ | Creator or manager |

### Comment endpoints

| Method | Path | Auth | Permission |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `POST` | `/tasks/{task_id}/comments` | ✅ | Project member |
| `GET` | `/tasks/{task_id}/comments` | ✅ | Project member (paginated) |

### Common query parameters

| Param | Used on | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `limit` | List endpoints | Page size (default 20, max 100\) |
| `offset` | List endpoints | Skip N items |
| `status` | Tasks | Filter by status enum |
| `priority` | Tasks | Filter by priority enum |
| `assignee_id` | Tasks | Filter by assigned user |
| `sort_by` | Tasks | Field name (`created_at`, `due_date`, `priority`) |
| `sort_order` | Tasks | `asc` or `desc` |

### Standard error response

| {  "detail": "Human-readable message",  "error\_code": "MACHINE\_READABLE\_CODE"} |
| :---- |

### Health check

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `GET` | `/health` | ❌ | Returns `{"status": "healthy", ...}` |

### WebSocket

| Path | Auth | Description |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| `GET /ws/notifications?token={jwt}` | ✅ | Real-time task status change notifications |

---

## 5\. Task Breakdown

### Phase 1 — Foundation 

| \# | Task | Est. |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 1.1 | Project scaffolding: dirs, `pyproject.toml`, `.env.example`, `.gitignore` | 0.5h |
| 1.2 | Config with pydantic-settings | 0.5h |
| 1.3 | Async DB engine \+ session factory | 4h |
| 1.4 | SQLAlchemy models (all 5 tables) | 4h |
| 1.5 | Alembic init \+ baseline migration | 4h |
| 1.6 | Security utilities (bcrypt \+ JWT \+ refresh) | 4h |
| 1.7 | Base repository \+ user repository \+ tests | 2h |
| 1.8 | Auth service \+ auth routes (register, login, refresh) \+ tests | 4h |
| 1.9 | Dependencies (get\_db, get\_current\_user) | 1h |
| 1.10 | User routes (GET/PATCH /users/me) | 2h |
| 1.11 | App factory \+ health check \+ wire routers | 1h |
| **Subtotal** |  | 25h |

### ✅ **Phase 1 checkpoint**: Register → Login → Use token → GET /users/me → PATCH /users/me → Refresh token. All via Swagger UI.

### Phase 2 — Core CRUD 

| \# | Task | Est. |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 2.1 | Pydantic schemas (all resources) \+ tests | 4h |
| 2.2 | Project repository \+ service \+ tests | 4h |
| 2.3 | Project routes (CRUD \+ members) \+ tests | 4h |
| 2.4 | Task repository \+ service \+ tests | 4h |
| 2.5 | Task routes (CRUD \+ assign \+ status) \+ tests | 4h |
| 2.6 | Comment repository \+ service \+ routes \+ tests | 4h |
| **Subtotal** |  | 24h |

### ✅ **Phase 2 checkpoint**: Full CRUD for projects, tasks, comments via Swagger. Filtering/sorting/pagination works on task lists.

### Phase 3 — Authorization & Cross-cutting

| \# | Task | Est. |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 3.1 | RBAC permission checker \+ dependency | 4h |
| 3.2 | Apply permission deps to all routes | 4h |
| 3.3 | Structured logging (structlog, JSON) | 2h |
| 3.4 | Middleware (request ID, timing, CORS) | 4h |
| 3.5 | Background tasks (email simulation) | 4h |
| 3.6 | WebSocket notifications | 4h |
| **Subtotal** |  | **22h** |

### ✅ **Phase 3 checkpoint**: Permission-denied returns 403\. Logs are JSON with request\_id. Background tasks log "email sent". WebSocket receives notification when task status changes.

### Phase 4 — Testing & Polish

| \# | Task | Est. |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| 4.6 | Swagger metadata, tags, example bodies | 4h |
| 4.7 | README, `.env.example`, ER diagram image \+ test around | 4h |
| **Subtotal** |  | 8h |

✅ **Phase 4 checkpoint**: pytest \--cov ≥ 80%. All endpoints tested. README has setup instructions. Swagger looks professional.  
---

## 6\. Estimation Summary

| Phase | Scope | Hours |
| :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Phase 1 | Foundation (setup, DB, auth) | 25h |
| Phase 2 | Core CRUD (projects, tasks, comments) | 24h |
| Phase 3 | RBAC, logging, background, WebSocket | 22h |
| Phase 4 | Testing ≥ 80% \+ polish | 8h |
| **Grand Total** |  | **79h** |
|  |  | **\~10 working days** |
